steps.title: Identify what emphasizing a difference requires
steps.content: The question asks to “emphasize a difference” between Water Line and Seven Earth Mountain. The correct answer must name both works and signal a clear contrast.

steps.title: Apply this to the choices
steps.content: C does this precisely: it names both works and uses “by contrast” to signal their material difference. A and B mention only Water Line; D mentions both but treats them as examples of the same category. That is the correct answer.
